Legends Awakened Card List

Diamond & Pearl series · Released August 1, 2008 · 146 cards

Browse the full Legends Awakened set. Tap any card to check its value, rarity and pricing history in the TCG Companion app.

Check Legends Awakened card values

Scan a card with your phone camera and get the current market price in seconds. TCG Companion covers every English Pokémon set, tracks your collection value, and spots fakes before you buy.

Download on the App Store
